title: cotula nigellifolia var. nigellifolia
intro: Cotula nigellifolia var. nigellifolia, commonly known as Black-seed Cotula or Cotula, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, pain management, and wound healing. Cotula nigellifolia var. nigellifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
